association:	none
edited:	false
status:	commented
--
## Code Review

This pull request introduces new configuration options for Radarr, Prowlarr, Overseerr, and a persistent notebook within the Nix module. Additionally, the configuration generation logic has been refactored to use builtins.toJSON instead of string templates, ensuring a more robust and structured output. I have no feedback to provide.
--
